productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Olive T-shirt
description: Composition Olive green U-neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, pin tucks that flare out at the back and brand button above the hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash at 30 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring, dry clean or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery For the sassy fashionista, this top from united colors of benetton has a covertly feminine appeal. This top with its simplistic cut and narrowing silhouette is an example of the label's versatile style. Pair this with skinny jeans, a jacket and closed toe pumps from catwalk. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
